name: Olive Garden San Remo
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Chicken breast halves, bone-in, skin-on, cut into thirds
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
2. Add peppers, onions, and mushrooms; sauté, stirring constantly for 15 to 20 minutes.
3. Add garlic and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Stir in tomatoes, herbs, wine, and bouillon granules.
5. Lower the heat and let simmer while preparing chicken.
6. Heat olive oil in a large non-stick skillet; dredge chicken in flour.
7. Sauté chicken until golden; do not crowd the skillet, adding more oil as necessary.
8. As pieces are browned, add them to the tomato-pepper sauce.
9. When all pieces have been added, cover and simmer for 10 minutes to finish cooking the chicken.
10. Serve the sauce over pasta.
